environment_decision.reason: The managed staging architecture is now defined, but provider, account, region, runtime entrypoints, service names, resource identifiers, secret references, and deployment configuration remain unresolved.

secret_rules: no raw secret values in Git
no raw secret values in integration evidence
no production secrets reused in staging
secret references must resolve only inside the managed host
secret rotation must not alter historical evidence

environment.name: simplee-private-staging
environment.purpose: Private managed staging environment for the official human Tower-to-Observatory walkthrough.

observatory.role: protected Observatory destination reached only through an approved Tower handoff

tower.role: only approved external front door for identity, permissions, owner step-up, routing, and Observatory launch
